generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor (I_M) installed on the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentMQTT
]

instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder located on the motor shaft, providing angular position."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionMQTT
]

instance SecondaryGearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox, providing angular position of the gear wheel."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionMQTT
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance SecondaryPositionMQTT : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryGearboxEncoderSensor
]

// C11: Enablers
instance FuncSysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling functional SysML modeling of the system."
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Based Systems Engineering using SysML to define the structural representation of Motor, Gearbox, and Cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:enables FuncSysMLModelingService
] 

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executable simulation models implemented in MathWorks Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MqttEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT (publish‑subscribe) for live data streaming from PT to DT."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAggregationService, TraceabilityService
]

instance AasEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for asset metadata management."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified web‑based dashboard that aggregates and displays DT state."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService, DataAggregationService
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance EngineeredSysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Engineering SysML model representing Motor, Gearbox, and Cycloidal gearbox of the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model capturing motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model capturing combined gearbox (mechanical + cycloidal) dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SystemSimulinkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model capturing full axis dynamics including motor, gearbox, and load."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb‑Viscous friction model implementation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implementation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implementation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implementation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

// C3: Data instances derived from sensor transmissions
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor current measurement (I_M) streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live motor angular position measurement streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live gearwheel angular position measurement streamed via MQTT."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ) computed from current and position."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor angular velocity (ω) computed from position."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor angular acceleration from position derivative."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox torque computed from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox angular velocity computed from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived gearbox angular acceleration computed from sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SystemTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "System‑level torque estimate derived from PT data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SystemAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "System‑level angular velocity estimate derived from PT data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SystemAngularAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "System‑level angular acceleration estimate derived from PT data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionMQTT
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time friction model identification using white‑box (analytical) and black‑box data‑driven models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionWearInsight, MotorCurrentAdjustmentInsight, ControllerCompensationInsight,
                AdjustMotorCurrentAction, UpdateControlCompensationAction
]

instance MultiPhysicsFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi‑physics friction identification across motor, gearbox, and system."
    DTDFVocab:provides MultiPhysicsFrictionInsight
]

instance DataAggregationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregates live sensor data traces and creates time‑stamped data points."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAggregationInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Audit‑trail traceability of data and model updates."
    DTDFVocab:provides PreventiveMaintenanceInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard displaying friction estimates and simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionWearInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on wear state of motor and gearbox inferred from friction estimates."
]

instance MotorCurrentAdjustmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight recommending adjustment of motor current based on friction model."
]

instance ControllerCompensationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on controller compensation parameter tuning to mitigate friction effects."
]

instance PreventiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating timing for preventive maintenance based on wear trend."
]

instance DataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reflecting aggregated data quality and completeness."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarizing visualized friction and simulation results."
]

instance MultiPhysicsFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on friction behavior across multiple components."
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustMotorCurrentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of motor current to compensate for identified friction."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance UpdateControlCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of controller compensation parameters based on friction model."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SchedulePreventiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual scheduling of preventive maintenance for motor or gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C5: Components and Environment
instance RobotAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of a MABI MAX 100 six‑axis industrial robot, driven by a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor with two gearboxes (mechanical gear and cycloidal gear)."
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotAxisComponent
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twin operates in real‑time, continuously ingesting live data and performing online friction model updates at the sensor sampling rate (motor current and encoder updates). Model evaluation and dashboard refreshes are performed synchronously with the real‑time data stream."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of (1) the physical robot (MABI MAX 100 first axis) providing sensor data via MQTT; (2) an AAS layer storing structural and property metadata; (3) a Processing component that consumes input DataTraces, applies Simulink simulation models (e.g., friction models), and generates computed DataTraces; (4) a visualization layer (dashboard) that presents real‑time plots of measured versus simulated torque/velocity; and (5) a data aggregation layer linking operational data to engineering models for traceability."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is applied during the operational phase of the robotic system, continuously ingesting live data during machining tasks. It also references pre‑existing engineering models derived during design and manufacturing, but its primary coverage is the operation stage with continuous data‑driven refinement of friction models."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through the use of high‑fidelity analytical friction laws (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and data‑driven black‑box models that are continuously identified against live measurements. Traceability from each DataTrace back to its generating source and computation model allows validation of model outputs against reference data from the PT. Uncertainty is mitigated by comparing frictionless simulation with observed torque/velocity and iteratively refining the friction parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT is the sole protocol used for transmitting sensor data from the robotic controller to the digital shadow. No additional network protocols or encoding details are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation follows SysML (v17) for modeling and Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for asset description. No other specific standards are cited."
]
